overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment beneath elevated highways. The scene transitions from open streets with vehicle traffic to covered walkways, a courtyard with exercising NPCs, a neon-lit food stall, and finally through a busy underpass with street vendors.

events.description: moves from open street with traffic onto covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and transitioning onto the green pedestrian walkway, passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: black van driving past on the street

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway with multiple levels casting shadows below
tall palm tree lining the pedestrian walkway
digital sign displaying number 11 in green neon
green paved pedestrian path running alongside the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The camera moves forward past a black van and palm trees, transitioning onto a green pedestrian walkway. The digital billboard displaying '11' remains visible in the background as the character enters the covered area under the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green pathway beneath the highway overpass, passing closed storefronts

entered.detail: green metal railings separating walkway from street level
shuttered commercial storefront with metal roll-down doors

segments.scene_description: Walking along the green tiled pathway beneath the massive concrete highway structure, the scene is characterized by dappled sunlight and shadows. Metal railings line the right side while closed storefronts appear on the left. The environment feels urban and slightly enclosed despite the open sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor courtyard with workout area and traditional decor

events.description: enters open courtyard area with trees and exercising people
encounters group of NPCs exercising on benches and stretching

agents.ego_description: turning into a courtyard area and walking past NPCs who are exercising and stretching on outdoor equipment

notable_agents.action: man doing push-ups on a white bench

entered.detail: mature tree with thick trunk providing shade in the courtyard
white exercise bench being used by NPCs for workouts
multi-story green building with balconies and air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-enclosed courtyard with dirt ground and traditional stone lanterns. Several NPCs are exercising on white benches beneath a large tree. The green residential building looms on the left while the highway structure recedes to the right, creating a neighborhood park atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall alley with neon signage

events.description: enters area illuminated by green neon lights from food stall

agents.ego_description: walking past a food vendor stall with green neon lighting, observing the counter and menu displays

entered.detail: food service counter with green fluorescent lighting and menu displays
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging outside the stall
circular illuminated sign with Japanese characters and food imagery
large blue industrial dumpster emitting steam

segments.scene_description: Passing through a narrow alley dominated by a food stall with distinctive green neon lighting and red paper lanterns. Steam rises from a blue dumpster near the path. The environment shifts from natural courtyard to artificial urban lighting as the character moves toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass intersection with traffic barriers

events.description: exits covered walkway and crosses street under highway overpass
crosses road intersection with yellow and red painted markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street beneath the highway overpass, navigating around traffic barriers

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow hard hat walking on sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
bright orange metal barriers directing pedestrian and vehicle flow
tall vertical digital advertisement screen on highway pillar

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character crosses a wide asphalt intersection beneath the highway overpass. Massive concrete support pillars dominate the space, with orange traffic barriers guiding the path. Construction workers and other pedestrians share the space as the camera moves deeper into the underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian area under highway with street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy underpass sidewalk passing vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at newspaper stand arranging magazines

entered.detail: rotating rack display with magazines and newspapers for sale
teal-colored vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a bustling pedestrian area beneath the highway overpass. A newspaper stand with rotating magazine displays occupies the center of the walkway, while a teal vending machine stands against the left wall. The concrete environment is populated with scattered pedestrians and workers, creating an urban underpass atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban street into the dense, neon-lit underbelly of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past palm trees and a black van before transitioning onto a green pedestrian walkway where dappled sunlight filters through the concrete structure. As the path leads away from the road, the scene shifts into a semi-enclosed courtyard with stone lanterns and exercising NPCs, before narrowing into a dim alleyway defined by green neon lighting, red lanterns, and rising steam. The camera then emerges from the covered walkway to cross a wide asphalt intersection dominated by massive support pillars and orange traffic barriers. Finally, the movement flows into a bustling pedestrian underpass populated by workers, a teal vending machine, and a rotating newspaper stand.
